name: Chicken Clemenceau
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups small green peas, thawed if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the andouille sausage into bite-size pieces; set aside.
2. Heat 4 tablespoons butter in a skillet over medium heat; add the sausage and cook until browned.
3. Add the remaining butter and garlic puree to the skillet, stirring until the butter melts.
4. Increase the heat to medium-high and add the chicken breasts.
5. Saute the chicken for 5 or 6 minutes, then add the mushrooms, peas, and salt.
6. Continue cooking and stirring until the mushrooms are tender and the chicken is cooked through.
7. Heat a large pan with enough oil to fill it about 2 inches deep over medium-high heat until it reaches 350-375°F (175-190°C).
8. Fry the potatoes in batches until lightly browned, then drain on paper towels.
9. Add the diced potatoes to the skillet with the chicken and stir well before serving immediately.
